title: Create translateTool and memoryTool implementations
completion_summary: Created translateTool.ts (translate tool) and memoryTool.ts (remember/recall tools) as ToolDefinition exports, following Phase A MVP placeholder pattern
context_files: src/lib/interpreter/promptComposer.ts (lines 1-70: existing translation prompt composition to wrap)
acceptance_criteria: translateTool wraps existing interpreter (reuses providerRouter + composeInterpreterPrompt)
translateTool accepts params: { text, sourceLang, targetLang }
memoryTool.ts exports createRememberTool() and createRecallTool(): ToolDefinition[]
remember uses jsonLearningStore.addGlossary or addCorrection to persist
recall uses jsonLearningStore.listRelevant to retrieve matching memories
All tools follow ToolDefinition interface exactly
